**JUFE-523 Rena Momozono 桃園怜奈 [FHD][HEVC][ENG]**

![JUFE-523](https://pics.dmm.co.jp/digital/video/jufe00523/jufe00523pl.jpg)

**結婚を前提に同棲しているゆうじと怜奈。社内キャンプがきっかけで付き合う事になった2人への粋な計らいで社長がお祝いキャンプを企画する。しかし急な仕事がゆうじに入ってしまう。酒が入ると歯止めが利かない怜奈が気掛かりでこまめに連絡を入れていたが徐々に怜奈が電話に出なくなりようやく連絡が取れたと思ったら何故か息遣いが荒い。「何かがおかしい…」そう思った時には既に事態は取り返しのつかない事になっていた。**

**Yuji and Reina are living together on the premise of marriage. The president of the company plans a celebration camp for the two, who have decided to get together because of an in-house camp. However, Yuuji has to work suddenly. He is concerned about Rena's inability to stop when she gets drunk and calls her frequently, but she gradually stops answering the phone and when he finally manages to reach her, she is breathing heavily for some reason. When I thought that something was wrong, the situation had already become irretrievable.**
